title: deduplicate form-tree walker in lib.rs
description: validate_stmt and collect_regex_patterns are structurally identical tree walkers: both scan for :regex tag, recurse into Block/TestList, then locate the last Str/StringList. Only the leaf action differs (compile-check vs cache-insert). The duplication means any change to the tree-walk (e.g. supporting new container forms) must be made in two places. Suggested rewrite: extract a single walk_regex_patterns(stmt, &mut impl FnMut(&str)) closure-taking helper that both functions delegate to. validate_stmt calls it with a closure that returns Err; collect_regex_patterns calls it with a closure that inserts into the cache.
